items.title: Conversation practice
items.body: Answer aloud first. Then complete the exercises.

items.prompt: Choose the English sentence for: Eu trabalho de manhã eu brinco de manha
options: I work in the morning I play in the morning
You work in the morning I play in the morning
I work in the morning I play in the morning 3.
morning the in play I morning the in work I

items.prompt: Choose the English sentence for: Eu trabalho à tarde Eu brinco à tarde
options: I work in the afternoon I play in the afternoon
You work in the afternoon I play in the afternoon
I work in the afternoon I play in the afternoon 3.
afternoon the in play I afternoon the in work I

items.prompt: Choose the English sentence for: Você trabalha à noite Você brinca à noite
options: evening the in play You evening the in work You
You work in the evening You play in the evening
I work in the evening You play in the evening
You work in the evening You play in the evening 3.

items.text: I work here I play soccer
You work there You play tennis
